summary: Add check-agents-drift.mjs script that compares AGENTS.md documented claims against filesystem reality. Detects numeric claim drift (package count, script count, plugin count, agent/skill definitions). Generates proposed fix report in .sisyphus/proposals/.
root_cause: 7 AGENTS.md files share a single commit (a90e397) and have never been updated. Claims like '34 packages' and '29 agent definitions' are significantly drifted from reality.
fix_approach: Created ESM drift detection script following resolve-root.mjs pattern. Extracts numeric claims via regex, counts filesystem reality, reports delta. Generates markdown proposal file for human review. Supports --json flag for machine consumption. Never auto-modifies AGENTS.md files.

validation.notes: Detected 7 drift issues across 2 AGENTS.md files on first run.
